diagrams.title: HTTP Request-Response Model
diagrams.description: Shows how a client sends HTTP request and receives response from server
diagrams.purpose: Understand how web clients and servers communicate using HTTP protocol

diagrams.title: FTP Connection Modes
diagrams.description: Compares active and passive FTP modes showing control and data connections
elements: Server with random port in passive mode
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how FTP establishes control and data connections differently in active vs passive modes

diagrams.title: SMTP Mail Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the flow of email from sender to receiver using SMTP and other protocols
diagrams.purpose: Understand how email travels through different components of email system
